This quick commerce business in Mumbai demonstrates strong financial health and growth potential, with a remarkable year-over-year GMV growth of 45.2%. With an average of 2,500 monthly transactions and a repeat customer rate of 68%, the business showcases a solid customer base and effective retention strategies, evidenced by a retention rate of 72%. The average order value of ₹450, combined with a low refund rate of 1.5% and zero late payments, further underscores its reliability and operational efficiency, making it an ideal candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

The apparel business in Bangalore is currently experiencing a year-over-year GMV decline of 5.0%, indicating a challenging market environment. Despite this, the business maintains a steady monthly transaction volume of 800, with a repeat customer rate of 40% and a customer retention rate of 35%, showcasing a solid base of loyal customers. The average order value stands at ₹1,200, reflecting a healthy spending pattern among customers, while the low late payment incidence of just 1 and a refund rate of 12.0% suggest effective financial management and customer satisfaction. These metrics collectively position the business as a viable candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

दिल्ली में इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स रिटेल व्यवसाय के लिए GrabCredit लोन पात्रता का मूल्यांकन करते समय, इस व्यवसाय की सालाना ग्रॉस मर्चेंडाइज वैल्यू (GMV) वृद्धि 12.5% है, जो स्थिर विकास का संकेत देती है। मासिक लेनदेन की संख्या 150 है, जबकि ग्राहक पुनरावृत्ति दर 15% और ग्राहक बनाए रखने की दर 20% है, जो ग्राहक संतोष और वफादारी को दर्शाता है। औसत ऑर्डर मूल्य ₹18,000 है, लेकिन लेट पेमेंट्स की संख्या 4 और रिफंड दर 8.2% है, जो कुछ वित्तीय जोखिम को इंगित करता है। इन आंकड़ों के आधार पर, व्यवसाय की लोन पात्रता का मूल्यांकन किया जा सकता है।

హైదరాబాద్‌లో ఉన్న కిరాణా స్టోర్‌కు గ్రాబ్‌క్రెడిట్ లోన్ అర్హత ఉంది. ఈ వ్యాపారం సంవత్సరానికి 22% GMV వృద్ధిని సాధించింది మరియు నెలకు 4500 లావాదేవీలు జరుపుతుంది. పునరావృత కస్టమర్ రేటు 85% మరియు కస్టమర్ నిలుపుదల రేటు 90% ఉన్నందున, కస్టమర్ నమ్మకాన్ని పెంచింది. ఆలస్యమైన చెల్లింపులు లేకపోవడం మరియు 0.2% రిఫండ్ రేటు ఉన్నందున, ఈ వ్యాపారం ఆర్థికంగా స్థిరంగా ఉంది.

The online pharmacy based in Pune demonstrates strong financial health and growth potential, with a remarkable year-over-year GMV growth of 110.0%. With an average order value of ₹850 and 1,200 monthly transactions, the business showcases a solid customer base, supported by a repeat customer rate of 55% and a customer retention rate of 60%. Additionally, the absence of late payments and a low refund rate of 2.5% further indicate reliable cash flow and customer satisfaction, making it a strong candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

The used car dealership in Chennai has demonstrated impressive growth, with a year-over-year GMV increase of 35.0%. With an average order value of ₹450,000 and 12 monthly transactions, the business shows strong sales activity, although it faces challenges with a repeat customer rate of only 5% and a customer retention rate of 8%. The low late payment rate of 2 and a refund rate of just 1.0% indicate a reliable payment history, making the business a viable candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

आपका ज्वेलरी स्टोर कोलकाता में 15% सालाना ग्रोथ के साथ एक मजबूत व्यवसाय है, जिसमें हर महीने 45 लेनदेन होते हैं। आपकी औसत ऑर्डर वैल्यू ₹85,000 है, और ग्राहक पुनरावृत्ति दर 25% है, जो आपकी ग्राहक संतोष और वफादारी को दर्शाता है। इसके अलावा, आपकी ग्राहक बनाए रखने की दर 30% है, और आप समय पर सभी भुगतान कर रहे हैं, जबकि रिफंड दर केवल 0.5% है। ये सभी आंकड़े आपके व्यवसाय की स्थिरता और विकास क्षमता को दर्शाते हैं, जिससे आप GrabCredit लोन के लिए योग्य हैं।

The software SaaS business based in Ahmedabad demonstrates strong financial health and stability, evidenced by an impressive year-over-year GMV growth of 88.0%. With a monthly transaction volume of 300 and a remarkable repeat customer rate of 92%, the business showcases its ability to retain customers effectively, reflected in a high customer retention rate of 95%. Additionally, the average order value stands at ₹15,000, while the absence of late payments and a minimal refund rate of 0.1% further underscore the reliability and trustworthiness of the business, making it a strong candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

आपका टिफिन सेवा व्यवसाय इंदौर में उत्कृष्ट प्रदर्शन कर रहा है, जिसमें सालाना ग्रॉस मर्चेंडाइज वैल्यू (GMV) में 18.0% की वृद्धि हो रही है। आपके पास हर महीने 6000 लेनदेन होते हैं, और ग्राहक संतोषजनक दर 95% है, जबकि ग्राहक बनाए रखने की दर 98% है। औसत ऑर्डर मूल्य ₹120 है, और आपके व्यवसाय में कोई देर से भुगतान या रिफंड की समस्या नहीं है, जिससे यह स्पष्ट होता है कि आपका व्यवसाय वित्तीय रूप से स्थिर और विश्वसनीय है। इस प्रकार, GrabCredit लोन के लिए आपकी पात्रता उच्च है।

The cosmetics online business in Chandigarh demonstrates strong financial health and growth potential, with a remarkable year-over-year GMV growth of 65.0%. With an average of 1,500 monthly transactions and a repeat customer rate of 50%, the business showcases a solid customer base and effective retention strategies, evidenced by a retention rate of 55%. Additionally, the average order value stands at ₹1,100, while maintaining a low refund rate of 3.2% and zero late payments, indicating reliable cash flow and customer satisfaction. These factors collectively position the business as a strong candidate for GrabCredit loan eligibility.

The organic grocery business in Surat demonstrates strong financial health and growth potential, with a remarkable year-over-year GMV growth of 55.0%. With an average of 3,200 monthly transactions and a repeat customer rate of 78%, the business showcases a solid customer base and loyalty. Additionally, an impressive customer retention rate of 82% and a low refund rate of 0.8% further indicate customer satisfaction and operational efficiency. The business has also maintained a low incidence of late payments, with only 1 recorded, highlighting its reliability in financial management.

लखनऊ में स्थित इस फर्नीचर स्टोर की सालाना ग्रॉस मर्चेंडाइज वैल्यू (GMV) में 5.0% की वृद्धि हुई है, जो इसके स्थिर विकास को दर्शाता है। स्टोर में हर महीने 85 लेनदेन होते हैं, लेकिन ग्राहक की पुनरावृत्ति दर केवल 10% है, जबकि ग्राहक बनाए रखने की दर 15% है। औसत ऑर्डर मूल्य ₹35,000 है, लेकिन 12 लेट पेमेंट्स और 4.5% की रिफंड दर इस व्यवसाय के लिए कुछ वित्तीय चुनौतियाँ पेश कर सकती हैं। इन आंकड़ों के आधार पर, GrabCredit लोन के लिए इस व्यवसाय की पात्रता का मूल्यांकन किया जा सकता है।

విశాఖపట్నంలో ఉన్న కాఫీ రోస్టర్స్ వ్యాపారం, సంవత్సరానికి 30% GMV వృద్ధిని సాధించింది. ఈ వ్యాపారం నెలకు 900 లావాదేవీలు నిర్వహిస్తుంది, అందులో 60% పునరావృత కస్టమర్లు ఉన్నారు. కస్టమర్ నిలుపుదల రేటు 65% కాగా, సగటు ఆర్డర్ విలువ ₹750. ఆలస్యపు చెల్లింపులు లేకపోవడం మరియు 0.5% రిఫండ్ రేటు ఉన్నందున, ఈ వ్యాపారం గ్రాబ్‌క్రెడిట్ లోన్ కోసం అర్హత కలిగి ఉంది.

आपका मोबाइल मरम्मत की दुकान, जो भोपाल में स्थित है, ने पिछले वर्ष 2.0% की ग्रॉस मर्चेंडाइज वैल्यू (GMV) वृद्धि दर्ज की है। आपकी दुकान में हर महीने 400 लेनदेन होते हैं, जिसमें से 20% ग्राहक दोबारा आपकी सेवाओं का उपयोग करते हैं, और ग्राहक बनाए रखने की दर 18% है। औसत ऑर्डर मूल्य ₹2,500 है, जबकि देर से भुगतान की दर 5% और रिफंड दर 1.5% है। ये आंकड़े आपके व्यवसाय की स्थिरता और विकास क्षमता को दर्शाते हैं, जो GrabCredit लोन के लिए आपकी पात्रता को मजबूत बनाते हैं।

The Ayurvedic Products business in Thiruvananthapuram demonstrates strong financial health and growth potential, with a remarkable year-over-year GMV growth of 75.0%. With an average of 2,200 monthly transactions and a repeat customer rate of 62%, the business showcases a solid customer base and loyalty. summarization.sum_003: Summarize this policy: 'Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days after the item is received at our warehouse.'
summarization.sum_004: Summarize: 'The GrabOn Cricket Fantasy League allows users to win points and redeem them for vouchers from top brands like Swiggy and Zomato.'
summarization.sum_005: Summarize: 'Our accidental damage insurance covers cracked screens, liquid spills, and hardware failures for all smartphones under 2 years old.'

summarization.sum_007: Summarize: 'GrabOn's gift cards can be used across multiple stores, including retail, dining, and online entertainment platforms.'
summarization.sum_008: Summarize: 'The new Llama 3 model on Groq is significantly faster than previous versions, enabling real-time classification at scale.'

-
-VALIDATION FIXES applied during integration (see full list at bottom of file):
-  1. Insurance labels changed from old set to new tests.json set

-  3. Adversarial expired-offer cases flagged (deal_008, deal_028)
-  4. Credit edge cases: zero txns, negative GMV, extreme refund rates

This Mumbai-based Quick Commerce business demonstrates strong growth with a 45.2% YoY GMV increase, supported by 2500 monthly transactions and a healthy average order value of ₹450. summarization.sum_002: Summarize: 'GrabOn is India's leading coupon company, saving millions for shoppers across 5000+ brands since 2013.'
summarization.sum_003: Summarize this policy: 'Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days after the item is received at our warehouse.'
summarization.sum_004: Summarize: 'The GrabOn Cricket Fantasy League allows users to win points and redeem them for vouchers from top brands like Swiggy and Zomato.'
summarization.sum_005: Summarize: 'Our accidental damage insurance covers cracked screens, liquid spills, and hardware failures for all smartphones under 2 years old.'
summarization.sum_006: Summarize: 'To qualify for GrabCredit, you must have a minimum monthly GMV of 1,00,000 INR and a clean repayment history for 6 months.'
summarization.sum_007: Summarize: 'GrabOn's gift cards can be used across multiple stores, including retail, dining, and online entertainment platforms.'
summarization.sum_008: Summarize: 'The new Llama 3 model on Groq is significantly faster than previous versions, enabling real-time classification at scale.'

diff --git a/tests/golden_suite.py b/tests/golden_suite.py
index 02e6153..3ee28cb 100644
--- a/tests/golden_suite.py
+++ b/tests/golden_suite.py
@@ -1,22 +1,3 @@
-"""
-golden_suite.py — GrabOn eval pipeline test suite.
-
-SOURCE OF TRUTH: tests.json (170 cases total)
-  - deal_copy_generation:            45 cases (4 channels, 3 languages, adversarial)
-  - insurance_intent_classification: 40 cases (5 labels, confidence calibration)
-  - credit_narrative_faithfulness:   55 cases (adversarial, edge cases, neg GMV)
-  - summarization:                   10 cases (multi-provider cross-val)
-  - classification:                   10 cases (customer intent sorting)
-  - extraction:                       10 cases (structured JSON data)
-
-VALIDATION FIXES applied during integration (see full list at bottom of file):
-  1. Insurance labels changed from old set to new tests.json set
-  2. Multi-coupon codes handled (deal_005, deal_017)
-  3. Adversarial expired-offer cases flagged (deal_008, deal_028)
-  4. Credit edge cases: zero txns, negative GMV, extreme refund rates
-  5. Confidence calibration metadata preserved for 3 insurance cases
-"""
-
 import json
 from pathlib import Path
 from typing import Any, Literal

summarization.sum_000: Summarize this GrabOn deal: 'Save 50% on all Nike shoes at Myntra using code NIKE50. Valid until Friday.'
summarization.sum_001: Summarize this user feedback: 'I tried to use the coupon for Amazon but it said expired. The customer support was helpful though and gave me a new one.'
summarization.sum_002: Summarize: 'GrabOn is India's leading coupon company, saving millions for shoppers across 5000+ brands since 2013.'
summarization.sum_003: Summarize this policy: 'Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days after the item is received at our warehouse.'
summarization.sum_004: Summarize: 'The GrabOn Cricket Fantasy League allows users to win points and redeem them for vouchers from top brands like Swiggy and Zomato.'
summarization.sum_005: Summarize: 'Our accidental damage insurance covers cracked screens, liquid spills, and hardware failures for all smartphones under 2 years old.'
summarization.sum_006: Summarize: 'To qualify for GrabCredit, you must have a minimum monthly GMV of 1,00,000 INR and a clean repayment history for 6 months.'
summarization.sum_007: Summarize: 'GrabOn's gift cards can be used across multiple stores, including retail, dining, and online entertainment platforms.'
summarization.sum_008: Summarize: 'The new Llama 3 model on Groq is significantly faster than previous versions, enabling real-time classification at scale.'
summarization.sum_009: Summarize: 'Always double-check the expiry date and terms of a coupon before attempting to checkout to avoid frustration.'
